# anthropic Provider

Manages Anthropic (Claude) platform resources via the Admin API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    anthropic = {
      source  = "sauterdigital/anthropic"
      version = "~> 0.1"
    }
  }
}

provider "anthropic" {
  # admin_api_key = "sk-ant-admin-..." # or set ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_API_KEY
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `admin_api_key` (String, Sensitive) Anthropic Admin API key. May also be set via the ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_API_KEY environment variable.
- `base_url` (String) Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://api.anthropic.com.
